explanation: Item 19 reports historical AUVs (gross sales only) for 7,010 franchised restaurants. The AUV measure captures top-line revenue only and does not include any cost/expense data. Since the AUV is not a profit measure, the CFF rate used does not affect the reported AUVs. The standard CFF for new franchisees is 5.9%; the cohort may include restaurants paying various rates (some under older agreements, some under incentive programs), but this only affects profitability, not the AUV figures disclosed. No pro-forma, illustrative, or comparable cohort with different economic terms is used — the data represents actual 2025 historical gross sales.
